title: Dossier path lacks frequency: dual-freq assets (BTC/ETH) have D1 dossiers clobbered by H4 (same signals/regime_stats/<ticker>/ path)
why: build_one_cell and regime_stats.main() write dossiers to signals/regime_stats/<ticker>/<regime>.json with NO frequency component. For assets that build BOTH frequencies (BTC/ETH: D1 and H4), the H4 run (runs after D1) overwrites the D1 dossiers at the same path. Verified: BTCUSD on-disk dossiers sum to 3224 n_bars = the H4 labeled count, so the D1 dossiers (547 labeled) are clobbered. The regime PARQUET is per-freq (BTCUSD_d1/h4_regimes.parquet) but the DOSSIER dir is per-ticker only. Latent since the dossier scheme predates multi-asset H4 (piece #3); now actively corrupts which frequency the hypothesizer/loop reads.
value_rationale: The autonomous loop consumes dossiers by (asset, regime) with no freq; today it silently gets H4 stats for dual-freq assets even when reasoning about D1. Corrupts the regime-conditioning input.
scope: Add frequency to the dossier path (signals/regime_stats/<ticker>_<freq>/<regime>.json or <ticker>/<freq>/<regime>.json)
Update build_one_cell + regime_stats.main() writers + manifest dossier paths
Update SKILL.md canonical File-layout + any consumer (loop_a_tick, run_proposal) that reads dossiers by asset
Regenerate all dossiers; consider folding in the B0067 self-healing skip-cleanup
recommendation: Per-(ticker,freq) dossier dir. Coordinate with consumers (loop_a/run_proposal) which currently address dossiers by asset only — they need a freq argument.
